zh.title: 分享 虾虾 给朋友
zh.subtitle: 复制下面这段文案分享给你的朋友或群聊，作者会非常感谢你。
zh.body:
最近发现了一个 OpenClaw 的一键安装包，叫做 虾虾。
几分钟就能装好并开始使用。

OpenClaw 可以做这些事：
- 浏览器自动化：自动搜索浏览、定时抓取信息、汇总处理
- 内容创作：写文案、生成 AI 图片
- 数据处理：处理 Excel、制作图表
- 办公自动化：批量处理邮件、筛选简历、填写表单
- 会议助手：会前整理资料做 PPT，会后快速生成纪要

如果你想低成本把内容、运营、办公、招聘自动化，可以试试：oneclaw.cn

en.title: Share 虾虾 with friends
en.subtitle: Copy this text and share it with your friends or group chats. The creator will really appreciate it.
en.body:
I recently found a one-click installer for OpenClaw called 虾虾.
You can get it installed and start using it in just a few minutes.

OpenClaw can help with:
- Browser automation: search, browse, capture scheduled information, and summarize results
- Content creation: copywriting and AI image generation
- Data processing: Excel workflows and chart creation
- Office automation: batch email handling, resume screening, and form filling
- Meeting assistance: pre-meeting prep and PPT generation, plus fast post-meeting minutes

If you want low-cost automation for content, operations, office work, and recruiting, try: oneclaw.cn
